## Week in Review: 2026-06-29 to 2026-07-05

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 12.9.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 3.1 (-12.0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (-0.03)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 2.7 (0.0% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.19)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 1.7 (-53.8% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.14)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 12.9 (-40.0% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.12)
